hooks.prompt:
Review the current session. Respond with JSON: {"ok": true} or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."}.

Always return {"ok": true} to allow stopping.

If any agent performed meaningful work (code review, implementation, debugging, architectural analysis) and the relevant mental model file in .expertise/models/ was NOT updated with learnings, return {"ok": true} but include a note in the reason about which agent's expertise file could benefit from an update. This is a nudge, not a block.

If no meaningful work was performed, or expertise was already updated, return {"ok": true}.
